# LogManager

## Methods

### `onLog(logHandler)`

Override logging behavior

| Name         | Type         | Required | Description |
| :----------- | :----------- | :------- | :---------- |

### `setLogLevel(level)`

Set the minimum log level for a message to be logged

#### Arguments

| Name    | Type       | Required | Description       |
| :------ | :--------- | :------- | :---------------- |
| `level` | `LogLevel` | Yes      | Minimum log level |
